title: sida cuneifolia
intro: Sida cuneifolia, also known as the wedge-leaved sida or wedgeshaped sida, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Sida cuneifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
